title: 11 Natural Remedies: Essential Oils to Help Kids Fight Strep Throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Echinacea purpurea essential oils have been traditionally used to help alleviate symptoms of strep throat due to their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The main constituents of Echinacea purpurea, such as alkylamides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, work together to reduce inflammation in the throat and fight off the bacterial infection that causes strep throat. When using Echinacea purpurea essential oils for strep throat, it's essential to dilute them with a carrier oil and apply topically to the affected area. You can also inhale the oils through steam inhalation or add them to a diffuser to help ease congestion and coughing.  To use Echinacea purpurea essential oils for strep throat, mix a few drops of the oil with a carrier oil like coconut or jojoba oil and apply it to the affected area using a cotton swab. You can also add a few drops of the oil to a warm bath or inhale the steam while adding a few drops of the oil to a bowl of hot water. If you're experiencing severe symptoms or difficulty breathing, consult a healthcare professional before using essential oils.
remedies.image_alt: Echinacea purpurea herbal essential oils for strep throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Eucalyptus globulus essential oils contain compounds like eucalyptol, which has antibacterial properties that help combat strep throat. Strep throat is caused by the Group A Streptococcus bacteria. Eucalyptol in Eucalyptus globulus essential oils can help reduce the bacterial load in the throat, thereby easing the symptoms of strep throat.  To use Eucalyptus globulus essential oils for strep throat, you can inhale the oil by adding a few drops to a humidifier or by directly inhaling it from a cloth or handkerchief. You can also mix a few drops of the oil with water and gargle with it, making sure to spit it out after gargling.  When you inhale the oil, the eucalyptol is absorbed into your bloodstream and helps to reduce inflammation in the throat, making it easier to swallow and talk. The antibacterial properties also help to fight off the infection, reducing the severity of the symptoms.  After using Eucalyptus globulus essential oils, you may experience a reduction in throat pain, fever, and swollen lymph nodes. Your symptoms may become milder, and you may be able to breathe and swallow more easily.
remedies.image_alt: Eucalyptus globulus herbal essential oils for strep throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Thymus vulgaris essential oils, also known as thyme oil, is a natural remedy for strep throat. The oil contains compounds like thymol and carvacrol, which have antimicrobial properties that help combat the Streptococcus bacteria responsible for the infection. These properties also reduce inflammation and ease the pain associated with strep throat. When used topically, thyme oil can be applied to the throat area using a warm compress or a few drops of oil mixed with a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil.  To use thyme oil for strep throat, add a few drops to a warm bath or inhale it through steam inhalation by adding a few drops to a bowl of hot water. You can also mix it with a carrier oil and apply it directly to the throat area using a cotton ball. Some people also add thyme oil to their diffuser or inhale it directly from a cloth soaked in the oil.  When you take action with thyme oil for strep throat, you can expect the following outcomes: the oil's antimicrobial properties will help combat the Streptococcus bacteria, reducing the severity of the infection. You may also experience reduced inflammation and pain, making it easier to swallow and speak. The oil's decongestant properties can also help relieve a sore throat and cough.
remedies.image_alt: Thymus vulgaris herbal essential oils for strep throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra essential oils, also known as licorice root oil, can be beneficial in soothing symptoms of strep throat. The oil contains compounds like glycyrrhizin and licochalcone, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and pain in the throat. Glycyrrhizin also exhibits antimicrobial properties, which can help combat the bacterial infection that causes strep throat. When using Glycyrrhiza glabra essential oils for strep throat, it's recommended to dilute the oil with a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil and apply it topically to the throat area using a cotton swab. You can also add a few drops of the oil to a warm compress or a humidifier to help loosen mucus and ease congestion. By taking these actions, you may experience a reduction in pain and inflammation, making it easier to swallow and communicate. The oil's antimicrobial properties may also help your body fight off the infection more effectively, leading to a faster recovery from strep throat.
remedies.image_alt: Glycyrrhiza glabra herbal essential oils for strep throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Salvia officinalis essential oils, also known as sage oil, has antimicrobial properties that can help alleviate strep throat symptoms. The oil contains constituents like camphor, bornyl acetate, and salvenic acid, which have been shown to inhibit the growth of Streptococcus pyogenes, the bacteria responsible for strep throat.  When using Salvia officinalis essential oils for strep throat, you can apply a few drops to a cotton ball and place it inside your mouth or inhale it through steam inhalation. You can also mix a few drops with a carrier oil like coconut oil and apply it to your throat area.  If you take action by using Salvia officinalis essential oils as directed, you may experience a reduction in throat pain and inflammation, and possibly an easing of your cough. The antimicrobial properties of the oil may also help your body fight off the infection more effectively. However, it's essential to note that essential oils should not be used as a replacement for medical treatment, but rather as a complementary therapy to help manage symptoms.
remedies.image_alt: Salvia officinalis herbal essential oils for strep throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Mentha x piperita essential oils, also known as peppermint oil, may help alleviate symptoms of strep throat. Its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to constituents like menthol, menthone, and limonene, can help combat the infection and reduce swelling in the throat. Menthol, in particular, has a numbing effect that can help soothe the pain and discomfort associated with strep throat.  To use Mentha x piperita essential oils for strep throat, you can add a few drops to a warm compress or inhale it through steam inhalation. You can also mix a few drops with a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil and apply it to the affected area. However, be sure to dilute the essential oil properly, as undiluted peppermint oil can be too harsh for the skin.  When using Mentha x piperita essential oils for strep throat, you can expect to experience relief from pain and discomfort, as well as a reduction in the severity of symptoms. You may also notice a decrease in inflammation and swelling in the throat. However, it's essential to note that essential oils should not replace medical treatment, and you should consult with a healthcare professional before using them to treat strep throat.
remedies.image_alt: Mentha x piperita herbal essential oils for strep throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba essential oils have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help soothe and heal strep throat. The main constituents of Ginkgo biloba essential oils are flavonoids, terpenoids, and bilobalide, which have been shown to inhibit the growth of Streptococcus pyogenes, the bacteria responsible for strep throat. When inhaled, the antibacterial properties of Ginkgo biloba essential oils can help reduce the severity of symptoms, such as a sore throat and fever. To use Ginkgo biloba essential oils for strep throat, add a few drops to a diffuser or inhale directly from a cloth or handkerchief. You can also mix a few drops of Ginkgo biloba essential oils with a carrier oil, such as coconut or olive oil, and apply it to your throat with a gentle massage. Drinking plenty of water and getting plenty of rest will help your body recover from strep throat. As you inhale the Ginkgo biloba essential oils, you may notice a reduction in throat pain and discomfort within 15-30 minutes. However, if your symptoms worsen or persist, seek medical attention as strep throat can lead to serious complications if left untreated.
remedies.image_alt: Ginkgo biloba herbal essential oils for strep throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Zingiber officinale essential oils, also known as ginger oil, has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help alleviate symptoms of strep throat. The oil contains constituents like zingiberene, bisabolol, and gingerol, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial infections. These properties make ginger oil an effective natural remedy for soothing sore throats and reducing the severity of symptoms. To use ginger oil for strep throat, apply a few drops to a warm compress and gently press it against your throat, or mix a few drops with a carrier oil like coconut or jojoba oil and apply it to your throat with a gentle massage. As you breathe in the warm, spicy aroma of ginger oil, you may start to feel a reduction in inflammation and a decrease in pain. You may also notice a decrease in the severity of your symptoms, such as a reduction in fever and a decrease in the frequency of coughing. However, it's essential to note that ginger oil is not a replacement for medical treatment, and you should continue to follow the advice of your healthcare provider.
remedies.image_alt: Zingiber officinale herbal essential oils for strep throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Hydrastis canadensis essential oils, also known as goldenseal, has been traditionally used to help combat strep throat due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The oil contains constituents like berberine, which has been shown to inhibit the growth of Streptococcus pyogenes, the bacteria responsible for strep throat. It also contains compounds like hydastain, which have anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce swelling and pain in the throat.  To use Hydrastis canadensis essential oils for strep throat, mix a few drops of the oil with a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil and apply it topically to the affected area. You can also add a few drops of the oil to a warm bath or inhale it through steam inhalation to help ease congestion and reduce inflammation. However, it's essential to note that essential oils should not be ingested, and you should consult with a healthcare professional before using them, especially if you have any underlying health conditions or are taking medications.  When used correctly, Hydrastis canadensis essential oils can help reduce the severity and duration of strep throat symptoms, such as soreness, congestion, and fever. The anti-inflammatory properties of the oil can also help reduce swelling and pain in the throat, making it easier to swallow and breathe. Additionally, the antimicrobial properties of the oil can help combat the underlying infection, promoting a faster recovery.
remedies.image_alt: Hydrastis canadensis herbal essential oils for strep throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Rosmarinus officinalis essential oils, commonly known as rosemary essential oil, has been used for centuries to help alleviate symptoms of strep throat. The properties of rosemary essential oil, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, make it an effective tool in fighting off the infection. The main constituents of rosemary essential oil, such as camphor, borneol, and bornyl acetate, have been shown to have antiseptic and expectorant properties, which can help to reduce the severity of strep throat symptoms.  To use rosemary essential oil for strep throat, you can add a few drops to a diffuser or inhale it directly from a cloth or handkerchief. You can also mix a few drops of rosemary essential oil with a carrier oil, such as coconut oil, and apply it to the affected area. Another option is to add rosemary essential oil to a warm compress and apply it to the throat to help reduce swelling and ease pain. When you inhale rosemary essential oil or apply it topically, the constituents of the oil can help to kill off the bacteria that cause strep throat, reducing the severity of symptoms such as sore throat, fever, and swollen lymph nodes. You may notice a reduction in throat pain and swelling within a few hours of use, and your fever may also decrease. In some cases, the use of rosemary essential oil may also help to reduce the duration of strep throat, allowing you to recover more quickly.
remedies.image_alt: Rosmarinus officinalis herbal essential oils for strep throat

remedies.remedy_desc: Mentha pulegium essential oils, also known as pennyroyal oil, has antimicrobial properties that can help combat strep throat. The oil contains constituents like menthone and limonene, which have been shown to exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. These properties can help reduce the severity of strep throat symptoms, such as sore throat and fever.  When using Mentha pulegium essential oils for strep throat, it's recommended to dilute the oil with a carrier oil, like coconut or olive oil, and apply it topically to the affected area. You can also inhale the oil's vapors by adding a few drops to a diffuser or by mixing it with steam inhalation. However, always consult with a healthcare professional before using essential oils, especially if you're pregnant or breastfeeding.  Taking action with Mentha pulegium essential oils may lead to a reduction in strep throat symptoms, such as a decrease in soreness and swelling of the throat. You may also experience relief from fever and general discomfort. However, it's essential to note that essential oils should not replace medical treatment but rather be used in conjunction with conventional medicine. If your symptoms persist or worsen, seek medical attention immediately.
remedies.image_alt: Mentha pulegium herbal essential oils for strep throat

intro_desc: Strep throat is a common problem for kids, especially during the school year. It's caused by a germ that can spread through coughing, sneezing, and close contact with others. When a child gets strep throat, it can be very painful and make it hard for them to swallow, speak, and even eat. They may feel tired, have a fever, and a sore throat that can be red and swollen. This can affect their daily life, making it hard for them to go to school, play with friends, and enjoy activities they love. They may feel miserable, irritable, and just want to rest and feel better.  When a child gets strep throat, doctors usually prescribe antibiotics to help fight the infection. But some parents are looking for other ways to help their kids feel better without relying on medicine. That's where herbal essential oils come in. These oils are made from plants and can be used in a variety of ways, such as through steam inhalation, adding them to bath water, or applying them to the skin (diluted, of course). Some of these oils have natural anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that may help ease the symptoms of strep throat, reduce the pain and swelling in the throat, and promote healing.  Herbal essential oils can be a useful addition to a child's treatment plan, helping to soothe and calm their body and mind while they recover from strep throat. When used properly and in combination with medical treatment, these oils may help make the recovery process a little easier.
intro_image_alt: herbal essential oils for strep throat
